name: Riwaayat Tapestry
story: A white base tapestry with orange birds and floral prints, bringing warmth, artistry, and a lively elegance to the wall.
description: A refined embroidered timeless floral and bird heritage for elegant spaces.

name: Do Saaye Tapestry
story: A modern art tapestry featuring two cats, bringing character, charm, and an artistic edge to the space.
description: A hand-finished modern feline art in pair.

name: Range-e-Parinda Tapestry
story: A vibrant red and blue tapestry with pots and colourful patterns, bringing bold artistry and lively character to the space.
description: A hand-finished embroidered piece with vibrant birds and floral rhythm.

name: Khizan-e-Zareen Tapestry
story: A tapestry with a maple leaves design in golden orange tones, bringing warmth, elegance, and a poetic expression to the wall.
description: An embroidered piece adorned with golden-orange maple leaves, bringing warmth and refined charm to the space.

name: Nashq-e-Zan Tapestry
story: A striking celebration of feminine tribal artistry with Kashmiri embroidery, bringing bold character, cultural depth, and expressive beauty to elevated spaces.
description: A bold feminine expression of tribal art, rich in character and artistic spirit.
